CREATE TABLE numbers (a INT, b INT);
SELECT a + b AS sum FROM numbers;
SELECT a + b AS sum FROM numbers WHERE a > 0;
SELECT a + b AS sum, a - b AS difference FROM numbers;
SELECT (SELECT a + b FROM numbers WHERE a < 0) AS negative_sum, (SELECT a + b FROM numbers WHERE a >= 0) AS positive_sum;
CREATE TABLE additional_numbers (c INT, d INT);
SELECT n.a + n.b + an.c AS total FROM numbers n JOIN additional_numbers an ON n.a > 0;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM numbers) AS count, (SELECT SUM(a + b) FROM numbers) AS total FROM numbers LIMIT 1;
SELECT a + (SELECT MAX(b) FROM numbers) AS max_sum FROM numbers;
SELECT n.a + n.b + (SELECT SUM(d) FROM additional_numbers) AS total FROM numbers n;
CREATE TABLE temp_numbers AS SELECT a + b AS sum FROM numbers;
SELECT SUM(sum) FROM temp_numbers WHERE sum > 0;
